heading: Applicability of regulations to subcontractors
label: 3746 Applicability of regulations to subcontractors
text: The regulations referred to in sections 3744 and 3745(a) and (b) of this title shall require prime contractors of a covered contract, to the maximum extent practicable, to apply the provisions of such regulations to all subcontractors of the covered contract.
